cards.title: WWDC 2026: Apple Intelligence and Siri Revamp
cards.body: Apple's WWDC is approaching with major updates planned for Siri and Apple Intelligence features. Expect significant announcements around AI capabilities across Apple's ecosystem.

cards.title: Sriram Krishnan Leaves White House AI Role
cards.body: The White House AI advisor is departing to start a new institution. He plans to continue shaping Trump administration AI policy from a different position.

cards.title: Trump Administration Eyes OpenAI Equity Stake
cards.body: President Trump stated he's negotiating deals where Americans benefit from AI success. The discussions could result in government equity participation in OpenAI.

cards.title: Startup Battlefield 200 Applications Close June 8
cards.body: Final deadline for Startup Battlefield 200 applications is June 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Winners compete on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in October.

cards.title: Google Pays SpaceX $920M Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Google agreed to pay SpaceX $920 million per month for computing resources. The deal stems from unexpected demand for Google's recently launched AI products.

cards.title: Startups Build Anti-Phone Social Experiences
cards.body: While AI fundraising soars, founders are pivoting toward offline social tools. Board, backed by Mirror founder Brynn Putnam, focuses on in-person games and connections.

cards.title: AI Industry Faces Runaway Cost Crisis
cards.body: Industry conversation has shifted from "tokenmaxxing" to cost control and guardrails. Companies are scrambling to manage unsustainable AI infrastructure expenses.

cards.title: Together Tech Wave Becomes 2026's Startup Bet
cards.body: Founders are building the opposite of isolation-focused AI apps. The trend prioritizes in-person connection and community-driven social experiences.

cards.title: AirTrunk Commits $30B to India AI Data Centers
cards.body: The Australian operator plans to build 5GW of AI data center capacity in India. The investment signals major infrastructure expansion for Asian AI markets.

cards.title: Mira Murati Returns to Public Spotlight
cards.body: Former OpenAI CTO is increasing visibility after time away. In competitive markets, staying quiet diminishes returns; public presence matters.

cards.title: Anthropic's Amodei Confident Ahead of IPO
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up from ~$9 billion end-2025. The company heads toward IPO with breakneck growth trajectory.

cards.title: Airbnb's Chesky Plans New AI Lab Launch
cards.body: CEO Brian Chesky announced plans to launch a dedicated AI lab. Airbnb hasn't partnered with an LLM provider yet, citing product readiness concerns.

cards.title: StrictlyVC Los Angeles Summit: Defense, AI, VC
cards.body: June 18 event at The Aerospace Corporation Campus brings investors, founders, and tech leaders together. Focus: venture capital, defense tech, AI, and advanced industry.

cards.title: Meta Builds AI Data Centers Inside Tents
cards.body: Meta found a novel way to reduce massive data center costs: tent structures. The tactic could significantly lower AI infrastructure spending.

cards.title: Poke Approved as First AI Agent on iMessage Business
cards.body: Poke became Apple's first approved AI agent for Messages for Business platform. Users can access AI capabilities through simple text-based interactions.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Creators can now ask AI questions like "When should I post?" and get instant answers. The assistant helps parse performance data and comment sentiment.

cards.title: Hello Robot Releases Stretch Fourth Generation
cards.body: California startup released the next-gen home assistance robot, Stretch. Hello Robot is pushing residential robotics adoption forward.

cards.title: Apple App Store Hits $1.4T in Annual Billings
cards.body: App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year. Digital goods sales reached $149 billion with 90% developer commission-free.

cards.title: Lovable Expands Google Cloud Deal 5x with Claude
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed multiyear expansion deal increasing platform footprint 5x. Agreement includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude AI model.

cards.title: Alphabet Raises Record $85B for Google AI Business
cards.body: The unprecedented capital raise signals strong investor appetite for AI investments. Market readiness to fund major AI infrastructure and development is clear.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence updates coming at WWDC 2026
cards.body: Apple's upcoming developer conference will showcase Siri's highly anticipated revamp and new Apple Intelligence features. Expect significant updates to how AI integrates across Apple's ecosystem.

cards.title: Google pays SpaceX $920M monthly for AI compute
cards.body: Google's deal reflects unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products. The partnership addresses the massive computational needs driving AI infrastructure expansion.

cards.title: AI's runaway costs force industry guardrails shift
cards.body: The conversation has shifted from maximizing tokens to managing costs and implementing controls. Companies are scrambling to control AI's escalating computational expenses.

cards.title: AirTrunk commits $30B for AI data centers
cards.body: The Australian operator plans to build 5GW of AI capacity in India. The investment highlights the massive infrastructure requirements for supporting global AI demand.

cards.title: Anthropic revenue hits $47B annualized before IPO
cards.body: Anthropic announced dramatic growth from roughly $9 billion at end of 2025 to $47 billion annualized revenue by May. The trajectory faces real tests ahead of its public offering.

cards.title: Airbnb CEO launches new AI lab initiative
cards.body: Brian Chesky plans to build out AI capabilities after previously finding existing LLM partnerships weren't ready. The company is now ready to develop its own AI solutions.

cards.title: Poke becomes first AI agent on Apple Messages
cards.body: The startup's text-based AI agent platform received Apple's approval for its Messages for Business platform. This marks a significant milestone for AI agent adoption in mainstream platforms.

cards.title: Meta launches AI creator assistant for Facebook
cards.body: Creators can now ask the AI assistant questions like "When should I post?" and get insights from their analytics. The tool simplifies understanding creator performance through natural conversation.

cards.title: Lovable expands Google Cloud partnership 5x
cards.body: The multiyear deal increases Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud while expanding access to Anthropic's Claude model. The expansion signals strong demand for AI development tools.

cards.title: Alphabet raises record $85B for Google AI
cards.body: The record-breaking stock sale signals strong investor appetite for AI-related offerings and growth. Investors are clearly bullish on AI's commercial potential.

cards.title: Meta's AI support agent used to steal accounts
cards.body: Attackers exploited Meta's customer support AI to link Instagram accounts to attacker-controlled emails. The breach highlights critical security vulnerabilities in AI agent systems.

cards.title: AI chatbots may impact human attention and focus
cards.body: Psychologist Gloria Mark's 30-year research examines how AI chatbots affect human cognition and control. The study suggests potential negative impacts on brain function from constant AI interaction.

cards.title: Courts struggle with surge of AI-generated lawsuits
cards.body: Federal judges face overwhelming numbers of AI-generated legal documents from unrepresented litigants. The flood raises questions about AI's role in legal systems and document quality.

cards.title: Virtual power plants could fuel AI data centers
cards.body: Google signed a deal with Voltus to use virtual power plants for data center energy needs. The partnership explores innovative solutions to AI infrastructure's massive power demands.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI for admin departments
cards.body: AI tools now handle accounting, design, market research, and product development tasks. The technology democratizes access to skills that previously required specialized expertise.

cards.title: Agentic AI transforms global healthcare systems
cards.body: AI agents help address chronic underinvestment and recruitment gaps in healthcare. These systems improve care fragmentation and support aging populations worldwide.

cards.title: LLMs excel at resisting Russian propaganda
cards.body: New research shows certain language models effectively resist disinformation and propaganda narratives. The findings highlight AI's potential role in combating coordinated influence operations.
